---
title: "The Team"
toc: false
---

We are three MITB students at Singapore Management University, working on this
project for ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications.

Each of us first investigated the TenantThread embargo breach on our own in
Take-home Exercise 2, and we independently reached the same reading of the case.
We then brought our three approaches together into one investigation console,
GLASSBOX, built around a single system health score that anyone can take apart
and test.

## Chen ZeXin

Built the GLASSBOX application and the system health model that runs through it,
from the four meters and the network view to the counterfactual sandbox, along
with the project website.

## Meng Tingyu

Led the data preparation and the analysis of the agents' private reasoning, the
shift from deliberation to reaction to justification over the course of the case.

## Meng Xinyu

Led the network analysis and the comparison of normal against crisis behaviour,
finding the decision core and the off-pattern actions that pointed to it.
